changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_authority ( user_id Integer NOT NULL, authority_name character varying(50) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT user_authority_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id, authority_name), CONSTRAINT fk3fq2nbqpjj9ir69n5rh3bduqe FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES app_users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk6ktglpl5mjosa283rvken2py5 FOREIGN KEY (authority_name) REFERENCES authority (name) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); INSERT INTO user_authority( user_id, authority_name) VALUES (1, 'ROLE_ADMIN');
